title: nissolia klugii
side_effects: Nissolia klugii can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, in addition to allergic reactions like skin irritation and respiratory problems. In severe cases, long-term exposure to the plant's toxins can lead to kidney damage and liver failure. Furthermore, improper use of Nissolia klugii can also cause cardiovascular issues, including increased heart rate and blood pressure. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for any health purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
